items.headline: Ben Stiller, Travis Scott and more lead NBA playoffs celebrity sightings
items.description: Celebrities have been out in style courtside at the NBA playoffs.

items.headline: Juraj Slafkovsky caps hat trick with OT winner for Canadiens
items.description: Juraj Slafkovsky, 22, the 2022 No. 1 overall pick back, scored his third power-play goal 1:22 into overtime and the Montreal Canadiens edged the Tampa Bay Lightning 4-3 in Game 1 of their first-round series Sunday night at Benchmark International Arena.

items.headline: O'Connor caps long comeback with key goal in Avs' Game 1 win
items.description: Logan O'Connor scored for the first time in nearly a year to help the top-seeded Avalanche beat the Kings in Game 1 on Sunday.

items.headline: Magic stun top-seeded Pistons with upset in Game 1
items.description: The Magic extended the NBA's longest home playoff losing streak after upsetting the No. 1 seed Detroit Pistons in Game 1 of their first-round series.

items.headline: Rinku banishes his boggart to finally win KKR a game
items.description: It might not have been so had Nandre Burger not shelled a chance, had Ravindra Jadeja bowled his fourth over, but Rinku Singh played what was in front of him to end KKR's losing streak

items.headline: Paolo Banchero scores 23 and Magic beat Pistons 112-101 to extend NBA's longest home postseason skid
items.description: — Paolo Banchero had 23 points, nine rebounds and four assists to lead the eighth-seeded Orlando Magic to a 112-101 win over the top-seeded Detroit...

items.headline: Magpies captain Moore 'feeling good', confident of Anzac Day return
items.description: Jordan Ridley is set to be sidelined with a fresh injury, dealing Essendon a major blow for their AFL Anzac Day blockbuster against Collingwood.

items.headline: Juraj Slafkovsky's hat trick lifts Canadiens to 4-3 overtime win over the Lightning in Game 1
items.description: — Juraj Slafkovsky scored his third power-play goal 1:22 into overtime and the Montreal Canadiens beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 4-3 in Game 1 of their first-round series on Sunday night.

items.headline: AFL Round 7: Team news, fixtures, games, tips, odds -- everything you need to know
items.description: Round 7 of the 2026 AFL season kicks off with a monster clash between the Western Bulldogs and Sydney, before the traditional Anzac Day blockbuster between Essendon and Collingwood takes place on Saturday.

items.headline: Jon Rahm caps wild week in Mexico with another LIV Golf win
items.description: Jon Rahm capped off a chaotic week on LIV Golf when he closed with a 7-under 64 on Sunday for a six-shot victory in LIV Golf Mexico City.

items.headline: San Antonio Spurs rock matching all-black suits before Game 1
items.description: San Antonio arrived in style for its first home playoff game since April 2019 with matching attire.
